title: Replace app background with uploaded yellow-red polygonal artwork

requirements.text: Save the uploaded yellow-to-red polygonal low-poly geometric artwork image (quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg) as the new hero background static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, replacing the existing file. Update the HeroSection component to use this new image as its full-screen background, maintaining the existing dark overlay so all text and CTA elements remain fully readable on top.

quotes: Ye AAP background per Laga den

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded yellow-red polygonal image is saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png, replacing the previous hero background file.
The HeroSection component displays the new polygonal artwork as its full-screen background image.
A dark overlay is applied on top of the background image so that all hero text, tagline, and CTA buttons remain clearly readable.
No other sections or components are affected by this background change.

constraints: Do not remove or modify the dark overlay on the HeroSection — text readability must be preserved.
nonGoals: Altering Navbar, Footer, or any other component styling.

edits: Resize and save as full-screen hero background (quality_restoration_20260224213607352.jpg > hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
